---
title: "06. 回归与循环"
subtitle: "Return, Reversal, and Cyclic Motion"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 6
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 14, 16, 25, 40, 50, 52, 56, and 65 map return, reversal, and rooted cyclicality onto inverse limits and dynamical systems."
---

**Chapters:** 14, 16, 25, 40, 50, 52, 56, 65  
**Omega Directions:** `dynamical systems`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_06_return_reversal_cycle.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_return_reversal_cycle_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_return_reversal_cycle_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_return_reversal_cycle_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_return_reversal_cycle_infographic.png)
